productDisplayName: Disney Kids Boy's He Is Behind You Red Kidswear
description: CompositionRed t-shirt in 100% cotton with Winnie the Pooh and Tigger print on the chest, blue lining along sleeve edges and stitch detailing along sleeve shirt hemsWash care1. Machine wash in cold water with gentle cycle using mild detergent2. Wash dark colours seperately3. Do not bleach4. Do not soak or wring5. Dry inside-out6. Do not tumble dry7. Do not iron on print and studsFittingComfort FitThis cheerful red t-shirt from disney is perfect for your little prince. Pooh and Tigger will keep him company while he romps around in the park or runs around with his friends. The cotton top will keep your little one comfortably dry and looks great when teamed up with denim shorts or three quarters for an enjoyable outing. Add on a pair of pretty footwear from the crocs collection available at myntra to make your handsome young man feel comfortable in style.
